name: solaris
description: Connect Codex to a scoped Solaris instance.

interface.shortDescription: Use scoped Solaris tools from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex terminal sessions to Solaris through user-controlled scoped API tokens. Codex must use /api/codex/* endpoints so Solaris Settings can enforce tool access.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Solaris only through configured scoped access. Check capabilities before reading or writing data.
